VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists as arXiv preprint 2503.17182 with the exact title "Radar-Guided Polynomial Fitting for Metric Depth Estimation" and lists Patrick Rim as the lead author (with 4 other authors matching the cited list). It also appears on OpenReview, consistent with a CVPR 2026 submission.
